---
title: "ascat_composite_control.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../ascat.html)

Controller for daily multi-day and monthly ASCAT composite jobs.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/ascat/scripts/ascat_composite_control.py >}}
```

:::
